meaning: vt.销售过多,卖空vi.卖空,吹嘘过度
examples: He has a tendency to oversell himself.
Don't oversell. Be natural, develop your own style.
Stay focused and don't try to oversell your capabilities.
This is a concept that too few financial advisors and insurance agents grasp when they oversell insurance or investments for retirement.
His tendency "to sometimes oversell a bit through passion" enabled Mr. Bull to obtain assistance from one manager about smart ways to sell ideas within a Korean business, he adds.
